availableModes.description: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.
availableModes.name: Read Only

availableModes.description: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)
availableModes.name: Default

availableModes.description: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.
availableModes.name: Full Access
